docket_entries.description: POS ENTERED 2/25/96 IS A COPY. ON MARCH 3RD. ORIGINAL SUBMITTED TO COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAIRBANKS, ANDREA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTERN MART $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
